Package neqsim.process.safety.esd

Class EmergencyShutdownTestPlan

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.esd.EmergencyShutdownTestPlan
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class EmergencyShutdownTestPlan extends Object implements Serializable
Configuration for one emergency shutdown dynamic test.

A plan combines the process disturbance, enabled and triggered logic sequences, monitored tagreader or automation signals, document references, and acceptance criteria. It is intentionally plant-agnostic so public NeqSim models can use logical tags while private historian tag names stay in the OperationalTagMap supplied by the caller.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

      public List<String> getEnabledLogicNames()
      Gets logic names that should be executed during the transient.
      Returns:
      immutable logic-name list, or empty to execute all supplied logic

      public List<String> getTriggerLogicNames()
      Gets logic names that should be activated at trigger time.
      Returns:
      immutable trigger logic list, or empty to trigger enabled logic
